home.title: Lucas SALI--ORLIANGE
home.subtitle: Data Science & AI Expert
home.intro_text: I am a passionate developer who specializes in applying Artificial Intelligence to financial business problems. My approach is collaborative by working directly with business operators to improve existing processes and increase profitability. All my solutions are built to be robust, scalable, and efficient, focusing on clean code and rapid delivery.

contact_section.title: Contact
contact_section.contact_text: Let's discuss your projects or digital innovation needs.

paragraphs.p1: Graduate engineer in Data Science & AI, I have delivered innovative solutions for complex challenges, from automated financial reporting to predictive modeling for sustainable industry. My commitment: design effective, robust, and high-impact tools for clients.
paragraphs.p2: My academic and professional journey has enabled me to master the full lifecycle of AI/ML projects, from data preparation to deployment and stakeholder communication. I thrive in teams and dedicate my skills to performance and profitability.

graduate_engineer.title: Graduate Engineer - Data Science & AI
graduate_engineer.description: Master’s degree, Data Science & AI specialization, ranked in the top 5% and recognized as Technical Valedictorian. Expertise in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, MLOps, and Data Visualization.

internship_research.description: R&D on eco-concrete property prediction using ML models. Authored a scientific report in English, demonstrating rigor and technical expertise.

project_outro: Ready to tackle your next challenges?

paragraphs.p2: Managed the full data science workflow: cleaning, feature engineering, modeling, and visualization, delivering strategic insights for decision-makers.
